summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The FT Vest U.S. Equity Dual Directional Buffer ETF - May (DLMY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims to match the price return of the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust up to a cap or on its inverse value down to a specified threshold, over a one-year period. The strategy includes a 10% buffer once the downside threshold has been breached. DLMY was launched on May 15, 2026 and is issued by First Trust.
